item.title: SnapZone 1.3
item.description:
SnapZone 1.3

  • All snap layouts, shortcuts, and trackpad gestures dynamically adapt to the available screen space.
  • Automatic updates powered by Sparkle — the app now checks for updates daily and notifies you when a new version is available.
  • Added Spanish language support.

SnapZone 1.2

  • New 'Centered Zone' layout with custom aspect ratios (e.g. 16:9 on ultra-wide 21:9 monitors).
  • Percentage scale adjustment (10–100%) for centered zones with live preview.
  • Ability to bind snap zones to specific monitors.
  • Fixed thumbnail preview for layouts with empty or scaled zones.
  • Improved drag-to-snap overlay to accurately reflect scaled layout dimensions.

SnapZone 1.1

  • Added Changelog view.
  • Fixed false gesture activations when dragging windows.
  • Granular toggles to enable/disable individual gestures (up, down, left, right, corners).
